- [Elon Musk and Sam Altman are going to court over OpenAI’s future](https://www.technologyreview.com/2026/04/27/1136466/elon-musk-and-sam-altman-are-going-to-court-over-openais-future/) — 15:52 · MIT Technology Review (AI)
  > After a yearslong legal feud, Elon Musk and OpenAI CEO Sam Altman are heading to trial this week in Northern California in a case that could have sweeping consequences. - [Rebuilding the data stack for AI](https://www.technologyreview.com/2026/04/27/1136322/rebuilding-the-data-stack-for-ai/) — 06:00 · MIT Technology Review (AI)
  > Artificial intelligence may be dominating boardroom agendas, but many enterprises are discovering that the biggest obstacle to meaningful adoption is the state of their data.
